segments.text: That's the thing with all these resets
segments.original_text: ダブルアップの多さなんですよね

segments.text: Getting them to dodge and tech
segments.original_text: 相手に回避させて受け身させて
その後に自分がまた置いてはいるんですけど

segments.text: But I still feel like I can definitely catch them after
segments.original_text: その後も絶対狩れるような気がしてるので

segments.text: So that's why the risk is so big when they escape
segments.original_text: やっぱり回避された時のリスクが大きいからですよね

full_text: That's the thing with all these resets Getting them to dodge and tech Then I'm spacing again But I still feel like I can definitely catch them after So that's why the risk is so big when they escape That's insane
